name: Interview Confirmation
response_html:
Dear {{ applicant_name }},

Thank you for scheduling your interview! We are pleased to confirm your interview for the {{ job_title }} at phamos GmbH.

📅 Date: {{ interview_date }}

⏰ Time:{{ interview_slot }} (German time, GMT+1)

📍 Location: Online

The interview will take place via the following link: 🔗 Join the Interview({{ interview_link }})

Please ensure you have a stable internet connection, a good headset, and a working camera, and join the meeting on time.

We look forward to speaking with you!

Best regards,

Philipp Gutstein

Head of HR
subject: Interview Confirmation – phamos GmbH
